docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANZANERES, JUANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
FIRST FILING PAID BY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANZANERES, JUANA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JUANA MANZANERES ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: INJUNCTION (PER EX PARTE ORDER OF 01/21/10). HEARING HELD AND ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED IN PART, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE NEW PROPOSED ORDER DELETING #1 AND #2 AS THOSE REQUESTS MERELY ORDER DEFENDANTS TO OBEY THE LAW AND ARE UNNECESSARY. MOTION GRANTED AS TO REQUEST #3 ONLY; HOWEVER, THE "CERTAIN ENUMERATED REPAIRS AND CORRECTIONS" MUST BE SET FORTH IN DETAIL. ORDER FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Juana Manzaneres Order To Show Cause Re: Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order Of 01/21/10)
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Juana Manzaneres Order to Show Cause Re: Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order of 01/21/10). Appearances: Jessica Alexandra, Esq. of Behrend, Morrison & Alexandra (415) 956-0549 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Michael Raifsnider, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 398-9001, specially appearing for Defendants. Hearing held and argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted in part, no opposition filed. Plaintiff to prepare new proposed order deleting #1 and #2 as those requests merely order defendants to obey the law and are unnecessary. Motion granted as to request #3 only; however, the "certain enumerated repairs and corrections" must be set forth in detail. Order for preliminary injunction signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797

Plaintiff Juana Manzaneres Order To Show Cause Re: Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order Of 01/21/10)
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Continued To Feb-08-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Juana Manzaneres Order to Show Cause Re: Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order of 01/21/10). (All calendar matters this date originating out of Department 302, were called from Department 301 by Judge Busch, due to unavailability of Judge Woolard.) Appearances: Jessica Alexandra, Esq. of Behrend, Morrison & Alexandra (415) 956-0549 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Defendants Cesar and Ana Gonzalas Defendants in Pro Per appearing and opposing party. Ruling: Matter continued to February 8, 2010, at 9:30 am in Department 302 for hearing. Parties waive notice of continuance date. (302/CWW) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Court Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189
